summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA-First Day Trading Engine refactor. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly. The major refactor removes the catalyst gate and uses Technical Analysis (Polygon OHLCV) as the PRIMARY driver for day trades.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/access returns valid token with code 'Bullishalmarkhan7.7' - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/settings returns dt_confidence_threshold of 65 - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan returns day_trades, pipeline_funnel, stats, rejected_details, dynamic_thresholds - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan pipeline_funnel has NO 'catalyst_passed' stage - SUCCESS

Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan pipeline_funnel has correct stages (universe_scanned, prefilter_passed, ta_analyzed, setup_found, filters_passed, confidence_passed, risk_approved, executed) - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan stats includes ta_analyzed, setups_found, filters_passed counts - SUCCESS

Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan day_trades candidates have explanation with key_indicators containing direction, best_setup, structure, rel_vol, spread_pct, rsi, macd_crossover, vwap_distance_pct, mtf_aligned, news_boost, momentum_mode, rr_ratio - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan rejected_details includes DAY_TRADE rejections with exact reject_reasons - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan dynamic_thresholds has dt_threshold, lt_threshold, risk_mode, regime_adjustment - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/auto-trade/refresh-ta triggers background TA refresh and returns db_cached count - SUCCESS
Backend: Dynamic thresholds adjust based on market regime (bearish +5, bullish -5) - SUCCESS
Backend: Pipeline funnel has bottleneck detection and top_rejections - SUCCESS
Backend: Scan uses ta_signals from DB cache - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page renders with data-testid='auto-trade-page' - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows PAPER deploy mode badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows CAUTIOUS risk mode badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows NEUTRAL BEARISH | Vol: 14.8% regime badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page has 'Refresh TA Data' button next to 'Scan Now' - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Diagnostics tab shows Pipeline Funnel with stages: Universe, Pre-Filter, TA Analyzed, Setup Found, Filters OK, Confidence, Risk OK, Executed - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Diagnostics tab shows 'Technical Analysis Engine Status' card with TA Analyzed=12, Setups Found=7, Filters Passed=5, DT Candidates=2 - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Diagnostics tab shows Dynamic Threshold Adjustments with DT Threshold=65, LT Threshold=72, Risk Mode=CAUTIOUS - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Candidates tab shows stats bar with 7 columns: Scanned (1250), TA Analyzed (12), Setups (7), Day Trades (2), Long Term (5), Watchlist (145), Rejected (310) - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Day Trades tab shows direction/setup info for candidates (VECO: SHORT - liquidity_sweep_short, FORM: LONG - fvg_bullish) - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Day Trades tab shows 'Rejected / Near-Miss DT (12)' section - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: TA-First refactor successfully removes catalyst gate - news is now ONLY a confidence boost, never a gate
Pipeline funnel correctly shows 8 stages without 'catalyst_passed': universe_scanned, prefilter_passed, ta_analyzed, setup_found, filters_passed, confidence_passed, risk_approved, executed
DynamicThresholdManager correctly implements DT_FLOOR=55, DT_DEFAULT=65 with regime adjustments (bearish +5, bullish -5)
TechnicalSignalGenerator.analyze_fast() uses Polygon OHLCV data for EMA 9/20/50, RSI 14, MACD 12/26/9, VWAP, RelVol, Market Structure, FVG detection
DayTradingEngine.evaluate_buy() uses TA signal as PRIMARY driver with news_boost as secondary
key_indicators in explanation correctly includes: direction, best_setup, structure, rel_vol, spread_pct, rsi, macd_crossover, vwap_distance_pct, mtf_aligned, news_boost, momentum_mode, rr_ratio
Frontend correctly displays all TA-first features: Pipeline Funnel, TA Engine Status card, Dynamic Thresholds, 7-column stats bar
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from Polygon API and cached TA signals in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: TA-First Day Trading Engine refactor fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Pipeline funnel has NO 'catalyst_passed' stage - replaced with ta_analyzed, setup_found, filters_passed stages. 2) dt_confidence_threshold=65 (lowered from 80). 3) DynamicThresholdManager applies regime adjustments: bearish +5, neutral_bearish +0, bullish -5. 4) Stats include ta_analyzed, setups_found, filters_passed counts. 5) Day trade candidates have TA-derived key_indicators: direction, best_setup, structure, rel_vol, spread_pct, rsi, macd_crossover, vwap_distance_pct, mtf_aligned, news_boost, momentum_mode, rr_ratio. 6) Frontend shows: Pipeline Funnel with 8 stages, TA Engine Status card, 7-column stats bar (Scanned, TA Analyzed, Setups, Day Trades, Long Term, Watchlist, Rejected), Rejected/Near-Miss DT section. 7) Refresh TA Data button triggers background TA refresh using Polygon API with 13s rate limiting.

frontend_components.ta_engine_status_card: Shows TA Analyzed, Setups Found, Filters Passed, DT Candidates
frontend_components.stats_bar_7_columns: Scanned, TA Analyzed, Setups, Day Trades, Long Term, Watchlist, Rejected
frontend_components.rejected_near_miss_section: Shows rejected DAY_TRADE items with reject_reasons

backend_apis.auto_trade_scan: Returns day_trades, pipeline_funnel, stats, rejected_details, dynamic_thresholds
backend_apis.auto_trade_refresh_ta: Triggers background TA refresh, returns db_cached count
